data.description: You can use your reaction to deflect or catch a missile when you are hit by a ranged attack with a monk weapon.
Immediately after you take the Attack action on your turn, you can spend 1 ki point to make two unarmed strikes. Your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

Immediately after you take the Attack action on your beginning at 1st level, while you are wearing no armor turn, you can spend 1 ki point to make two unarmed strikes and not wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

Immediately after you take the Attack action on your turn, while you are wearing no armor, you can spend 1 ki point to make two unarmed strikes and not wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

Starting at 3rd level, you can use your reaction to deflect or catch the missile when you are hit by a ranged attack. When you do so, the damage you take from the attack is reduced by 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your monk level.
